title: SPECTROPHOTOMETRIC DETERMINATION OF THE CONCENTRATION AND NUCLEOPHILICITY OF QUATERNARY AMMONIUM AND PHOSPHONIUM SALTS BASED ON THE REACTION OF NUCLEOPHILIC OPENING OF THE EPOXIDE RING
author: Bakhtin, S.G.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
A new spectrophotometric method for determining the content of tetraalkylammonium or phosphonium salts is proposed, based on the chromogenic S N 2 reaction of oxirane ring opening in the systems "epoxide – salt R 4 N +  X  –  or R 4 P +  X  –  – proton donor reagent". Formal kinetic patterns of the epoxide ring opening reaction in the proposed systems are investigated.  
    Keywords:         tetraalkylammonium, tetraalkylphosphonium, oxirane, epoxide, nucleophilicity
steps_raw:

Formal kinetic patterns of the epoxide ring opening reaction in the proposed systems are investigated.  
    Keywords:         tetraalkylammonium, tetraalkylphosphonium, oxirane, epoxide, nucleophilicity
